title: UK REACH refusal of authorisation for the Surface Engineering Association (on behalf of Cannock Chemicals Limited), 28 May 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation under UK REACH.   Substance name   Chromium trioxide   Applied for use   The use of chromium trioxide for the formulation of surface treatment process solutions – specifically producing chromic acid from chromium trioxide by the addition of water.   Applicant   Surface Engineering Association (on behalf of Cannock Chemicals Limited)   Date of decision   28 May 2025  "
